note: SNG-223: per-tradition visual-prompt guidance so a craft's generated image READS as its tradition (Ashwarden crafts look Ashwarden, Wright crafts look Wright). Built ON TOP of each tradition's canon `aesthetic` field in traditions.json (never replacing it) - this translates that prose aesthetic into image-generator language: palette, materials, light, mood. CCode's ensureImage('ability') prompt (SNG-223) prepends the craft's tradition block here to the craft's own authored description. Aevi-authored 2026-07-22.
usage: For a craft of tradition T: image_prompt = <craft.description> + ', in the visual style of ' + traditions[T].{palette, materials, light, mood}. The craft's OWN description is the subject; this is the STYLE wrapper so the whole tradition coheres.

umbral.name: The Umbrals
umbral.canonAesthetic: lightless deeps, sight without light, soft-footed, everything felt not seen
umbral.palette: near-black, cold indigo, faint bioluminescent teal
umbral.materials: wet stone, unlit passages, soft cloth
umbral.light: no light source — form implied by touch, edges felt not lit

blazeborn.name: The Blazeborn
blazeborn.canonAesthetic: glass plains, revelation as violence, the burning truth, no shadow permitted
blazeborn.palette: white-gold, glare-blown highlights, no true shadow

rootkin.name: The Rootkin
rootkin.canonAesthetic: grown not built, green-heart, sap and bark and slow enormous patience
rootkin.light: green-filtered canopy light, slow and warm

ashwarden.name: The Ashwardens
ashwarden.canonAesthetic: grey ash-fields, the mercy of stopping, quiet keepers of last things
ashwarden.palette: greys, bone-white, faded charcoal, a single quiet ember
ashwarden.light: low, level, the grey light of a still morning
ashwarden.mood: the mercy of stopping — solemn, tender, kept

marcher.name: The Marchers
marcher.canonAesthetic: honed steel, the line that holds, scars worn as record
marcher.materials: honed blades, scarred armor, the held line
marcher.light: hard edge-light, a blade catching the sun

stillhold.name: The Stillhold
stillhold.canonAesthetic: white walls, unbroken quiet, a peace that has forgotten why it was needed
stillhold.materials: smooth plaster, unbroken walls, empty rooms
stillhold.light: even, sourceless, a quiet that has forgotten its reason
stillhold.mood: unbroken peace, almost eerie in its calm

somatic.name: The Somatics
somatic.canonAesthetic: breath and sinew, movement as speech, the body as the only instrument
somatic.materials: breath, sinew, bare movement, no tools
somatic.light: warm side-light modelling muscle and motion
somatic.mood: the body as the only instrument — kinetic, present

cogitant.name: The Cogitants
cogitant.canonAesthetic: thin bodies, vast interiors, memory-palaces, thought as force
cogitant.materials: thin frames, vast implied interiors, memory-palaces
cogitant.light: dim, inward, the glow of thought not sun
cogitant.mood: still body, immense interior — thought as force

churnfolk.name: The Churnfolk
churnfolk.canonAesthetic: improvised everything, luck-riding, nothing twice, joyous mess
churnfolk.materials: improvised gear, patched cloth, lucky junk
churnfolk.mood: joyous mess, luck-riding, never twice the same

lattice.name: The Lattice-Cities
lattice.canonAesthetic: arcologies, perfect prediction, the binding of possibility, no accident permitted
lattice.materials: arcology glass, seamless alloy, no accident
lattice.light: flat perfect illumination, no unplanned shadow
lattice.mood: total prediction, the binding of possibility

enginewright.name: The Enginewrights
enginewright.canonAesthetic: gear-teeth and pressure, systems all the way down, the Precursor arts at their most technical
enginewright.light: forge-glow and gauge-light, systems all the way down
enginewright.mood: technical, dense, mechanical to the core

numinous.name: The Numinous
numinous.canonAesthetic: thinning veils, meaning without matter, the mystic disciplines the Valley only rumors
numinous.materials: almost nothing — meaning without matter, thinning veils
numinous.light: a light with no source, the mystic rumor

threnodist.name: The Threnodists
threnodist.canonAesthetic: tidal, expressive, public weeping and public joy, architecture shaped for feeling
threnodist.materials: flowing cloth, water, architecture shaped for feeling
threnodist.mood: public weeping and public joy — tidal, expressive

syllogist.name: The Syllogists
syllogist.canonAesthetic: clean lines, argument as architecture, the cold pleasure of a proof
syllogist.palette: clean white, single ink-black line, cold blue
syllogist.light: even and clear, the cold pleasure of a proof

veilwright.name: The Veilwrights
veilwright.canonAesthetic: mirrors and masks, nothing quite where it appears, hospitality you cannot trust
veilwright.materials: mirrors, masks, surfaces that aren't where they seem
veilwright.light: reflected and doubled — you can't trust the source
veilwright.mood: beautiful, untrustworthy, nothing quite where it appears

verist.name: The Verists
verist.canonAesthetic: unadorned stone, no ornament, a truth that does not care whether you can bear it
verist.palette: raw stone-grey, no ornament, honest brown
verist.materials: unadorned stone, plain wood, nothing decorative
verist.light: flat honest daylight, no flattering angle
verist.mood: a truth that doesn't care whether you can bear it

abyssal.name: The Abyssal Choir
abyssal.canonAesthetic: horned architecture, bargains, an honesty about appetite the pious lack
abyssal.materials: horned architecture, bargain-marks, appetite made stone
abyssal.light: low red glow from below, honest about hunger
abyssal.mood: frank appetite, bargains, an honesty the pious lack

seraphic.name: The Seraphic Orders
seraphic.canonAesthetic: tiered spires, unbearable choral certainty, mercy administered from above
seraphic.light: radiant from above, unbearable choral certainty

mason.name: The Masons of the Given
mason.canonAesthetic: stone, weight, ledgers, a deep suspicion of anything that cannot be weighed
mason.materials: cut stone, weight, ledgers, the measured and provable
mason.mood: suspicious of anything unweighable — grounded, dense

figurist.name: The Figurists
figurist.canonAesthetic: impossible geometry, buildings that are arguments, a place that resists being mapped
figurist.materials: impossible geometry, buildings that are arguments
figurist.light: light that bends wrong, a place resisting the map

horizon.name: The Horizon-Walkers
horizon.canonAesthetic: tents and roads, distance as home, a people with no fixed anything
horizon.materials: tents, roads, distance itself as home
horizon.mood: no fixed anything — distance as home

hourkeeper.name: The Hourkeepers
hourkeeper.canonAesthetic: clock-towers, archives that run forward, an unbearable patience
hourkeeper.materials: clock-towers, forward-running archives, gears of time
hourkeeper.light: the patient light of a long-kept room
hourkeeper.mood: unbearable patience, time held and counted

unmaker.name: The Unmakers
unmaker.canonAesthetic: controlled ruin, beautiful demolitions, an ethic of clearing
unmaker.materials: beautiful demolition, ordered ruin, the cleared space
unmaker.light: light entering a thing just opened
unmaker.mood: an ethic of clearing — ruin made beautiful and deliberate

wright.name: The Wrights of the New
wright.canonAesthetic: scaffolds forever, half-built cathedrals, the joy and the waste of it
wright.materials: scaffolds forever, half-built cathedrals, tools mid-use
wright.light: work-light on the unfinished, the joy and waste of it
wright.mood: never finished, and that's the point — becoming
